name: Manicotti (Ceideburg)
recipeIngredient: 8 Manicotti noodles, cooked 8 minutes and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and garlic in a skillet. Drain any excess fat.
2. In a bowl, blend the creamed cottage cheese, shredded mozzarella cheese, salt, mayonnaise, and remaining ground beef until well combined.
3. Fill each manicotti with the mixture.
4. Place the filled manicotti in a single layer in a 9 x 13-inch pan.
5. Sprinkle any remaining filling over the manicotti.
6. Cover the manicotti with spaghetti sauce.
7. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese over the top of the manicotti.
8. Cover the pan with foil and bake at 325°F for 15 minutes.
9. Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 to 15 minutes, or until bubbly.
10. Serve and enjoy!
